name: @dropship/desktop
description: macOS Electron wrapper for the Hearst Dropship Next.js platform

scripts.dev: tsc -p tsconfig.json --watch & wait-on dist/main.js && cross-env ELECTRON_IS_DEV=1 ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE= electron .
scripts.package: npm run build && cross-env ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE= electron-builder --mac --dir
scripts.dist: npm run build && cross-env ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE= electron-builder --mac
scripts.release: npm run build && cross-env ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE= electron-builder --mac --publish always
